item.description:
Release v4.10.0

Changes since v4.9.1

  • deps: upgrade libgit2swift to latest main
  • docs: reconcile TODO against current codebase, remove completed items
  • docs(todo): add EditorFileTreePlugin UI fluency optimization plan
  • docs(todo): remove completed tasks
  • docs(todo): update LumiUI migration status based on actual progress
  • feat: add verbose flag to control FreeModel diagnostic logging
  • feat(chat): only show assistant tool calls in detailed verbosity
  • feat(core): add addSettingsTabs and addSettingsView to LumiPlugin protocol
  • feat(file-tree): watch .git metadata and add git status provider tests
  • feat(mlx): render inline download UI when selected model is not downloaded
  • feat(model-selector): add provider summary card with model stats in right list
  • feat(plugin): ActivityHeatmapPlugin registers settings tab and settings view
  • feat(plugins): add onboarding pages with localizations
  • feat(ui): support plugin-registered settings tabs in SettingsView sidebar
  • feat(zhipu): register ZhipuAPIProvider alongside ZhipuProvider
  • feat(zhipu): rename provider display name to "智谱 Coding Plan"
  • fix: avoid creating LumiDownloads in ~/Downloads on startup
  • fix: defer @published changes to next runloop to avoid view update warnings
  • fix: replace invalid SF Symbols
  • fix: resolve avoidable compiler warnings
